m_Item1.QuestionText: Waht happens when you push a new element in Dynamic Stack (stack using Linked List)

Options.OptionText: The New node is placed at the front of the Linked List
The new node is placed at the back of the Linked List
The new node is placed at the middle of the Linked list

m_Item1.Explanation: Stack works with LIFO principle so element get added at front of the Linked List
